title: ipomoea batatas var. leucorrhiza
intro: Ipomoea batatas var. leucorrhiza, also known as the white potato vine, is a variant of the sweet potato plant, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and edible tubers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Ipomoea batatas var. leucorrhiza include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin conditions and wounds.
